---
title: "Mostly Monte Carlo Seminar Series"
---

::: callout-warning
## This site is no longer maintained

Antoine Luciano no longer organises the Mostly Monte Carlo seminar.

For up-to-date information, please visit the **new official website**: [mostly-monte-carlo.github.io](https://mostly-monte-carlo.github.io/)
:::

A monthly seminar (mostly) on the theory and practice of Monte Carlo in statistics and data science.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Held on the **2nd Friday of each month** (approximately) at the **PariSanté Campus**.

Organised by Timothy Johnston and Cameron Bell.

Organisers emeriti: Andrea Bertazzi, Joshua Bon, and Antoine Luciano.
